---
title: "Project Phase 1 Analaysis"
author: "Korlapati Keerthana"
date: "05/3/2026"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
  html_document:
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
---
```{r}

import pandas as pd
import os
import glob

def load_participant_data(folder):

    task_files = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(folder, "*_task_*.csv")))
    test_files = sorted(glob.glob(os.path.join(folder, "*_test_*.csv")))

    participants = {}

    for f in task_files:
        pid = os.path.basename(f).split("_")[0]
        participants.setdefault(pid, {})["task"] = f

    for f in test_files:
        pid = os.path.basename(f).split("_")[0]
        participants.setdefault(pid, {})["test"] = f

    return participants


def classify_stimulus(path):

    if "foil" in path:
        return "foil"
    elif path.endswith("a.jpg"):
        return "target"
    elif path.endswith("b.jpg"):
        return "lure"
    else:
        return "unknown"
```

```{r}


```
